pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the practice website with quick access to booking, services, emergencies, and promotions. Highlights key services, featured whitening offers, and provides one-click paths into core flows like booking, emergencies, and new-patient info.
primary_functions: Provide immediate paths to book an appointment, request an emergency callback, or contact the practice
Highlight key services such as cleanings, pediatric care, orthodontics, and whitening promotions
Surface quick links to Special Offers, New Patients info, and Emergency Dental Care

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click primary hero CTA button labeled "Book Appointment"
Click "Emergency Care" alert banner or CTA
Click featured whitening promotion tile
Click "New Patients – Children" quick link
Click "View all services & pricing" link
Click "Contact us" footer/secondary CTA
Click "View locations & hours" teaser

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Home"
Directly loaded at site root URL

pages.name: Services & Pricing
pages.description: Overview of all dental services with clear uninsured pricing, organized by category (preventive, restorative, cosmetic, orthodontic, emergency). Supports searching for procedures like molar root canals and crowns and deep-links into booking and cost estimate flows.
primary_functions: List services by category (preventive, restorative, cosmetic, orthodontic, etc.) with uninsured prices
Allow users to find specific procedures such as molar root canals and crown options with detailed pricing
Provide links or buttons from services to book related appointments or request a cost estimate

incoming_params.description: Optional service category (e.g., 'preventive', 'restorative') to pre-select and scroll into view.
Optional Service ID to highlight (e.g., Invisalign consultation or specific whitening service).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Book this service" button in a service row/card
Click "Request cost estimate" link under a service (e.g., molar root canal plus crown)

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Services & Pricing"
Linked from footer as "Services & Pricing"
Category or specific service can be preselected using URL parameters

pages.name: Our Dentists
pages.description: Directory of all dentists at the practice with filters for specialty, location, rating, and child-friendliness. Supports finding pediatric dentists with Saturday hours and strong ratings before booking.
primary_functions: Display dentist cards with name, specialty (including pediatric), star rating, and primary locations
Allow filtering and sorting by specialty (e.g., pediatric), rating (e.g., 4+ stars), and location
Link to individual dentist profile pages for more details and scheduling with a specific provider

incoming_params.description: Optional specialty filter (e.g., 'pediatric_dentistry', 'orthodontics') applied on load.
Optional minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.0) to filter dentists.
Optional location ID to filter dentists who practice at a specific clinic.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a dentist’s name or photo card
Click inline "Book with this dentist" shortcut on a dentist card (if shown)

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Our Dentists"
Pre-filtered dentist lists can be accessed using specialty/rating/location URL parameters

pages.name: Dentist Profile
pages.description: Detail page for an individual dentist including biography, ratings, locations, and schedule options. Enables users to confirm Saturday availability and then book directly with that provider.
primary_functions: Show dentist details such as qualifications, specialties (e.g., pediatric), and patient rating (star score)
Display office locations and hours, including whether the dentist offers Saturday appointments
Provide a prominent ‘Schedule with this provider’ button that opens the booking page with the dentist pre-selected

incoming_params.description: ID of the dentist whose profile should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Schedule with this provider" button
Click an office location link in the profile

access_methods.description: Accessed via dentistId URL parameter from the dentist listing or other deep links

pages.name: Orthodontics & Invisalign
pages.description: Information hub for orthodontic treatments, comparing Invisalign and traditional braces, with a focus on adult cosmetic concerns and treatment duration. Drives Invisalign consultations into the booking flow.
primary_functions: Explain and compare Invisalign (clear aligners) with traditional metal braces in appearance and typical treatment duration
Highlight that Invisalign can provide nearly invisible treatment with average timelines under 24 months when applicable
Offer a clear ‘Schedule Invisalign Consultation’ call-to-action leading to a pre-filled Invisalign consultation booking form

incoming_params.description: Optional focus section, e.g., 'invisalign' to auto-scroll to the Invisalign comparison.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Schedule Invisalign Consultation" CTA within Invisalign section
Click "View orthodontic pricing" link

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Orthodontics"
Linked from Invisalign mentions on the homepage and other pages

pages.name: Insurance & Payments
pages.description: Details about accepted insurance plans, coverage levels, and payment options. Includes side-by-side comparisons of key plans like Delta Dental PPO and Cigna Dental to help patients choose higher preventive coverage before booking.
primary_functions: Present side-by-side details for key plans such as Delta Dental PPO and Cigna Dental, including preventive care coverage percentages
Help users identify which plan offers higher preventive coverage for services like routine cleanings
Provide buttons or links to proceed directly to the booking page with an insurance provider pre-selected or easily selectable

incoming_params.description: Optional comma-separated plan names or IDs to highlight (e.g., 'Delta Dental PPO,Cigna Dental').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Book a cleaning with this plan" or similar button under a plan
Click "Ask a billing question" link

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Insurance & Payments"
Linked from footer navigation as "Insurance & Payments"

pages.name: Emergency Dental Care
pages.description: Guidance for dental emergencies, including after-hours instructions and contact options. Emphasizes severe toothache instructions and exposes the after-hours emergency phone number and emergency form.
primary_functions: Describe what to do for common emergencies, including a specific section on severe toothache with self-care tips
Clearly display the after-hours emergency phone number for urgent situations after 8:00 PM
Link to an ‘Emergency Contact Form’ page for sending an urgent message and callback request

incoming_params.description: Optional condition type (e.g., 'severe_toothache') to auto-expand the relevant emergency instructions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Emergency Contact Form" link within the Severe Toothache section

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Emergency Care"
Linked from footer navigation as "Emergency Dental Care"
Specific condition sections can be focused using the conditionType URL parameter

pages.name: New Patients
pages.description: Information for first-time patients with separate guidance for adults and children. Includes a child-specific section describing the recommended visit type for a 10-year-old and links into the booking flow.
primary_functions: Provide an overview of what to expect at a first visit, with tabs or sections for Adults and Children (Under 13)
Describe recommended visit types for children, including a clearly labeled ‘Child New Patient Exam’ for 10-year-olds
Offer a ‘Schedule First Visit’ button that opens the booking page with appropriate child or adult visit types highlighted

incoming_params.description: Optional patient group to show by default ('adult' or 'child_under_13').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Schedule First Visit" button in Children (Under 13) section
Click "Schedule First Visit" button in Adults section
Click "See accepted insurance" link

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "New Patients"

pages.name: Special Offers
pages.description: Listing of current discounts and promotions such as whitening deals for new patients. Enables filtering for whitening offers under $200 and deep-links into promotion detail and booking.
primary_functions: Display current promotions, including cosmetic teeth whitening offers, with pricing and eligibility (e.g., new patient)
Allow users to identify whitening promotions priced at or below $200
Link to detailed promotion pages where users can claim an offer or schedule a related appointment

incoming_params.description: Optional promotion type filter (e.g., 'whitening').
Optional maximum price filter (e.g., 200 for whitening specials under $200).
Optional flag ('true'/'false') to filter promotions by new-patient eligibility.
Optional promotion ID to visually highlight in the list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a promotion tile title or "Learn More" link
Click inline "Claim Offer" / "Schedule" button directly from promotion card (if offered)

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Special Offers"
Linked from footer navigation as "Special Offers"
Promotion list can be pre-filtered using promotionType, maxPrice, and isNewPatientOnly URL parameters

pages.name: Promotion Detail
pages.description: Detailed description of a single promotion, including conditions, price, and how to claim. Used heavily for whitening specials for new patients, feeding into the booking flow with promotion context.
primary_functions: Show full details for a specific promotion such as a new-patient teeth whitening offer under $200
Explain terms and conditions, including who qualifies (e.g., new patients) and what is included
Provide a ‘Claim Offer’ or ‘Schedule Whitening’ button that opens the booking form with the promotion and service pre-selected

incoming_params.description: ID of the promotion whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Claim Offer" or "Schedule Whitening" button
Click "Back to all offers" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via promotionId URL parameter from the Special Offers list or homepage

pages.name: Contact & Cost Estimates
pages.description: General contact page with a form to send questions and request treatment cost estimates, including detailed scenarios for uninsured patients such as molar root canal plus crown.
primary_functions: Allow users to submit general inquiries to the practice via a contact form
Support detailed cost estimate requests, including uninsured scenarios such as molar root canal plus crown with a typed total cost
Collect essential contact information (name, phone, email) so staff can respond with clarifications or confirmations

incoming_params.description: Preselects the type of inquiry (e.g., 'general_question' or 'cost_estimate').
Optional subject line for the inquiry (e.g., 'Molar root canal with crown estimate').
Comma-separated Service IDs referenced in the estimate request (e.g., molar root canal and selected crown type).
Optional flag ('true'/'false') indicating whether the patient is uninsured.
Optional pre-filled message template that the user can edit when requesting a cost estimate.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Return to homepage" link from the submission confirmation message

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Contact"
Linked from footer navigation as "Contact & Cost Estimates"
Form submission handled via submitContactSubmission interface

pages.name: Book Appointment
pages.description: Central appointment booking form used for new and existing patients across services and locations. Supports complex flows such as next-week evening cleanings, Saturday pediatric visits with specific dentists, Invisalign consultations, and whitening promotion bookings.
primary_functions: Let users select patient type (new or existing), age group (adult/child), and visit reason (e.g., Adult Teeth Cleaning, Child New Patient Exam, Pediatric Exam, Invisalign Consultation, Whitening Consultation)
Allow selection of clinic location (e.g., Downtown), specific dentist when applicable, and insurance provider information
Provide date and time pickers with support for selecting weekday or weekend appointments and time-of-day ranges (morning, afternoon, evening)

Enable users to request specific appointment types such as weekday evening cleanings next week, Saturday pediatric visits after 11:00 AM, new-patient child exams on weekday afternoons, and consultations tied to promotions or Invisalign
Collect required contact and patient details (names, phone, email, notes) and submit appointment or consultation requests

incoming_params.description: Indicates which page initiated booking (e.g., 'homepage', 'dentist_profile', 'orthodontics_page', 'promotion_page', 'new_patients_page', 'insurance_page').
Optional service ID to preselect the visit reason (e.g., Adult Teeth Cleaning, Child New Patient Exam, Invisalign Consultation, Whitening Consultation).
Optional dentist ID for booking with a specific provider.
Optional location ID to preselect a clinic (e.g., Downtown).
Optional insurance plan ID to preselect a plan in the booking form.
Optional promotion ID for tying the appointment to a special offer (e.g., whitening promotion).
Optional age group preselection ('adult' or 'child').
Optional flag ('true'/'false') indicating that this booking is tied to a new-patient promotion.
Optional initial time-of-day filter, e.g., 'morning', 'afternoon', 'evening'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Home" link from the booking confirmation state
Click "See insurance & payment options" link from within the booking form
Click "Have questions? Contact us" link below the form

access_methods.description: Linked from main header navigation as "Book Appointment"
Booking form can be prefilled with service, dentist, location, insurance, or promotion via URL parameters
Appointment requests submitted via submitAppointmentRequest interface

pages.name: Emergency Contact Form
pages.description: Dedicated form for sending urgent messages to the practice during dental emergencies. Used after reading emergency instructions, especially for after-hours severe toothache cases where a same-night callback is requested.
primary_functions: Allow users to describe their emergency, including condition (e.g., severe toothache) and current time
Prompt users to include the after-hours emergency phone number and explicitly request a same-night callback when needed
Collect necessary callback details (name, phone, email if required) and submit an urgent message to the practice

incoming_params.description: Condition type selected from the Emergency Dental Care page (e.g., 'severe_toothache').
After-hours emergency phone number shown on the emergency page, copied into the form.
Optional hint for the time of the emergency (e.g., '9:00 PM') to prefill the description.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to emergency instructions" link after sending the message
Click "Return to homepage" link from confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed from Emergency Dental Care page via URL parameters specifying the condition and phone number
Emergency messages submitted via submitEmergencyMessage interface

pages.name: Locations & Hours
pages.description: Information about all clinic locations, including addresses, hours, and contact details such as the Downtown clinic. Provides a starting point to choose a location before booking.
primary_functions: List all clinic locations (such as the Downtown clinic) with addresses, phone numbers, and maps if available
Show office hours by day for each location, clarifying weekday evenings and Saturday availability
Provide quick links from each location section to the booking page with that location pre-selected

incoming_params.description: Optional location ID to emphasize (e.g., Downtown) when page loads.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Book at this location" button under a location
Click "Ask about this location" link

access_methods.description: Linked from footer navigation as "Locations & Hours"
Specific locations can be highlighted using the highlightLocationId URL parameter

pages.name: About Our Practice
pages.description: Background information about the dental practice, team, and philosophy of care. Reinforces trust with summaries of adult and child care, specialties, technology, and safety.
primary_functions: Explain the practice’s mission, history, and approach to patient care for adults and children
Introduce the team and highlight areas of expertise such as pediatric dentistry, orthodontics, and cosmetic services
Reinforce trust with information about safety, technology, and patient comfort initiatives

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Meet our dentists" link
Click "Information for new patients" link

access_methods.description: Linked from footer navigation as "About Our Practice"

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Policy describing how patient data and contact information submitted through the site is handled, including booking and emergency submissions.
primary_functions: Inform users how their personal and health-related information is collected, stored, and used
Clarify data protection practices for appointment requests, emergency messages, and contact forms
Provide contact details for privacy-related questions or concerns

access_methods.description: Linked from footer navigation as "Privacy Policy"

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the practice website and online services, including limitations for medical advice and online booking tools.
primary_functions: Describe acceptable use of the website and its content
State disclaimers regarding medical information provided on the site versus in-person diagnosis
Outline limitations of liability and conditions for using online booking and contact forms

access_methods.description: Linked from footer navigation as "Terms of Use"

header_links.description: View all dental services and uninsured pricing
Meet the dentists and find pediatric or highly rated providers
Learn about Invisalign and other orthodontic options
Information for first-time adult and child patients
Review accepted insurance plans and coverage details
See current promotions like whitening discounts
Get help and contact options for dental emergencies
Request a cleaning, exam, consultation, or other visit
Send a message or request a cost estimate

footer_links.description: Learn more about the dental practice
See clinic locations, including the Downtown clinic, and opening hours
Review accepted insurance plans and payment options
Read emergency instructions and contact information
Contact the office or request treatment cost estimates
Read terms and conditions for using this website
